famous quote:
"Aim at Heaven and you will get Earth 'thrown in': aim at Earth and you will get neither."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Joyful Christian)
Interview Text:
Jacob (name changed):

(part 2)

He thinks he'll be taken to China some day because he's had some visions about it. There is a woman in China who he would like to marry. One day he drove by the university building where he had gone to college with her and suddenly right there at the stop light he got a strong impression that he was to pray for her. He didn't realize until later he was speaking in fluent mandarin in his prayer. But then a vision whisked him away and he saw himself praying for and with rural Chinese people. It was so real he could smell their clothes. He prayed for them the whole day. But then he found himself back at the stoplight just before it turned green.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine if God's love for us, and ours for him was like this.
